memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CoapMsg *msg, SYN_CoapOption *options, size_t max_options, size_t *option_count, const uint8_t *buf, size_t buf_len)
memberdef.name: syn_coap_parse

briefdescription.para: Parse a raw CoAP packet into a message structure.

parameterdescription.para: Length of the raw packet in bytes.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on malformed input.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SYN_CoapMsg *msg, const SYN_CoapOption *options, size_t option_count, uint8_t *buf, size_t max_buf_len)
memberdef.name: syn_coap_serialize

briefdescription.para: Serialize a CoAP message into a byte buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Options array (will be sorted by option number).

simplesect.para: Number of bytes written, or 0 on error (buffer too small).

briefdescription.para: Cooperative protothread task to execute a CoAP client request.

parameterdescription.para: Scheduler task (user_data must point to a SYN_CoapRequest).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CoapRequest *r, const SYN_SockAddr *server_addr, const SYN_CoapMsg *msg, uint32_t timeout_ms, uint8_t retries)
memberdef.name: syn_coap_request_init
